hero_slide2_s: Generate flashcards in seconds, not hours.
hero_slide3_h: Tired of random, low-quality AI cards?
hero_slide3_s: Generate precise flashcards strictly from highlights.
library_subtitle: Select a collection to begin your immersive study session.
ready_to_process: Ready to process your own PDF?
experience_next_gen: Experience the next generation of study tools designed for efficiency and retention.
feature_instant_capture_desc: Upload your PDFs and instantly turn them into flashcards. No context switching required.
feature_smart_study_desc: Practice directly in your browser with our built-in flashcard player. Track your progress and master concepts faster.
feature_easy_export_desc: Export your generated flashcards to .csv format instantly. Perfectly formatted for Anki and other major study tools.
pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your study needs.
delete_deck_message: Are you sure you want to delete this deck? All associated flashcards will be permanently removed.
